_note: Synthetic vectors authored against the device wire format (Tektelic channel/type TLV on fPort 10). Inputs are constructed from the known register layout in reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is authored here per the normalized vocabulary, not copied from upstream normalizeUplink. Battery is decoded as volts ((level & 0x7f)*0.01+2.5); accel_alarm_status (header 0x00 0x00) is the accelerometer move alarm -> action.motion.detected.

uplink.description: Full data uplink: battery, on-board temp/humidity, acceleration vector, and accelerometer move alarm (motion detected)
Standalone accelerometer move alarm uplink (motion detected, no other channels)
Battery at end-of-service (max level + EOS flag) with move alarm clear (no motion)
Non-data port (BLE scan results on fPort 25) is rejected
Unrecognized channel/type on the data port is rejected
